summary.fix_strategy: Added missing @Builder Lombok annotation to all DTO classes that use builder pattern in service and test code. Preserved all existing annotations (@Data, @NoArgsConstructor, @AllArgsConstructor) and validation constraints. No changes made to business logic or configuration.
